title: [FIRRTL] Zero Width GCT Taps Crashes in LowerToHW
body:
The following can produce a crash:

```scala
circuit Top : %[[
  {
    "class":"sifive.enterprise.grandcentral.DataTapsAnnotation",
    "blackBox":"~Top|DataTap",
    "keys":[
      {
        "class":"sifive.enterprise.grandcentral.ReferenceDataTapKey",
        "source":"~Top|Top>w",
        "portName":"~Top|DataTap>_0"
      }
    ]
  }
]]
  extmodule DataTap:
    output _0: UInt<0>

  module Top:
    wire w: UInt<0>
    w is invalid
    inst tap of DataTap
```

`firtool Foo.fir -firrtl-grand-central`:
```
Assertion failed: ((srcWidth != 0) && "Lowering produced value for zero width source"), function setLowering, file LowerToHW.cpp, line 2043.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
```
